# Luke Ketterhagen — Yoga & Meditation

> Luke Ketterhagen is a yoga teacher, meditation guide, and retreat leader with nearly 18 years of experience in the Himalayan tradition. He leads retreats, international excursions, teacher trainings, and corporate wellness programs.

## Pages

- /: Homepage — overview of Luke's offerings
- /retreats: Residential yoga and meditation retreats at the Himalayan Institute, Honesdale PA
- /excursions: Small-group spiritual journeys to North India (2026), Uganda (2027), and South India (2028)
- /trainings: 200-hour yoga teacher training, workshops, and professional development
- /corporate: Corporate wellness — lunchtime yoga, seminars, and workplace retreats
- /about: Luke's background, philosophy, and lineage in the Himalayan tradition
- /contact: Contact Luke directly

## About

Luke teaches in the Himalayan tradition, rooted in the teachings of Swami Rama and the Himalayan Institute in Honesdale, Pennsylvania. His work integrates yoga, pranayama, meditation, and Ayurveda for personal and collective transformation.
